title: CodeBlock component — fenced samples
description: Pre/code CodeBlock primitive for multi-line samples with monospace styling and optional language hints.

intro: Use CodeBlock for copy-ready snippets with horizontal scrolling on narrow viewports and aria-labels describing language hints.

faqs.question: Does CodeBlock highlight syntax?
faqs.answer: Not by default—pipe highlighted nodes as children or integrate a highlighter in your app shell.

faqs.question: How does language prop help?
faqs.answer: It shapes aria-label text for assistive technologies and future highlighting integrations.

faqs.question: Can children include JSX?
faqs.answer: Pass plain text children for simplest cases; advanced highlighting may inject spans inside code.

sections.heading: What it does
sections.body:
Wraps children in pre/code with padded, bordered surfaces.

Overflow-x keeps wide snippets usable on mobile.

sections.heading: Composition and API
sections.body:
Tone adjusts text color consistently with other typography primitives.

Extend via className when embedding inside cards.

sections.heading: Accessibility
sections.body:
Labels describe the snippet purpose.

Ensure focus order still reaches surrounding explanatory text.

sections.heading: Next.js integration notes
sections.body:
Avoid importing massive highlighters into server layouts unnecessarily.

Lazy-load heavy highlighting clientside when needed.
